movie_1.name: Inception
movie_1.description: A skilled thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a C.E.O.

movie_2.name: The Shawshank Redemption
movie_2.description: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

movie_3.name: The Dark Knight
movie_3.description: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham, Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological and physical tests, to fight injustice.

movie_4.name: Interstellar
movie_4.description: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

movie_5.name: Pulp Fiction
movie_5.description: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster and his wife, and a pair of diner bandits intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.

movie_6.name: Forrest Gump
movie_6.description: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson, the Vietnam War, and the Watergate scandal unfold from the perspective of an Alabama man with an IQ of 75.

movie_7.name: The Matrix
movie_7.description: A computer hacker learns from mysterious rebels about the true nature of his reality and his role in the war against its controllers.

movie_8.name: Avatar
movie_8.description: A paraplegic Marine dispatched to the moon Pandora on a unique mission becomes torn between following his orders and protecting the world he feels is his home.

movie_9.name: The Godfather
movie_9.description: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his clandestine empire to his youngest son.

movie_10.name: The Avengers
movie_10.description: Earth's mightiest heroes must come together and learn to fight as a team to prevent an alien invasion.
